opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I came back from Bali a few weeks ago, and suddenly I feel like I've been hit by a truck. I can't look at food, and my urine looks like black coffee. This morning the whites of my eyes have gone yellow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The yellow eyes and dark urine came on fast and I feel terrible — high fevers, exhausted, and I'm worried because I live alone and can't keep anything down.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 4 days ago with fevers and feeling wiped out; the yellow eyes appeared this morning
symptom_narrative.duration: 4 days and changing — the jaundice and dark urine are new in the last day or two
symptom_narrative.character: began with low fevers, drenching fatigue and feeling generally poisoned, then no appetite at all, nausea and vomiting; now yellow eyes, tea-coloured urine, pale putty-coloured stools and relentless itching all over
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever felt — bedbound, only getting up to crawl to the toilet
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: a dull ache under my ribs on the right side, but mostly it's my whole body feeling wrecked
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and the yellow and the itching seem to be getting worse each day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to eat or even smell food makes the nausea worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: gone right off cigarettes — I normally smoke a pack a day and now the thought of one makes me sick; skin itches everywhere
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't work, can't eat, bedbound, only able to walk to the bathroom then need to rest

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally healthy, no ongoing medical problems

social_history_volunteered.smoking_status: usually a pack a day, but has developed a strong aversion to smoking over the last few days
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: ate local street food and drank tap water while travelling in Bali
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: returned from Bali about 4 weeks ago; lives alone with no one at home to help

objective_data_offered.value: the whites of the eyes look clearly yellow and the skin has a yellow tinge on camera
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: Patient-facing camera impression only; not a clinician examination and no measured bilirubin.

objective_data_offered.value: urine looks like black coffee / tea-coloured
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: Patient description of urine colour, not a urinalysis.
Patient description of stool colour, not an examination.

objective_data_offered.value: feels hot and feverish and keeps vomiting; cannot keep much food or fluid down
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: Subjective fever and vomiting; no home thermometer reading provided.
